channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: High-Cost Southern Border Surveillance Tech Failing to Deliver - $6 Billion Spent Over Two Decades
item.description: Recent reports reveal that high-cost southern border surveillance technology is failing to deliver on its purpose, with nearly one-third of cameras on primary surveillance towers currently offline.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: How you can prepare your TikTok account for the upcoming ban
item.description: If you’re one of the 170 million TikTok users in the U.S., it’s time to start making sure your account is properly secured and updated ahead of the impending January ban.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role
item.description: The role of the White House national cyber director has emerged as a key issue for former cyber officials as the Trump administration prepares to take over. The post Groups urge Trump to reinforce National Cyber Director role first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: Sophia, a world-renowned robot, has been the center of attention at an Artificial Intelligence and Innovation fair in Zimbabwe this week.
item.dc:creator: By Farai Mutsaka, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps
item.description: CISA has worked with agencies in recent years to expand data captured by the CDM program, improve log retention, and boost network threat hunting operations. The post CISA cyber leader says agencies have addressed SolarWinds gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: GSA closes in on enterprisewide software deal with Microsoft
item.description: Laura Stanton, GSA’s assistant commissioner for the IT category, said GSA, OFPP have worked with agencies to come up with 24 standard terms and conditions. The post GSA closes in on enterprisewide software deal with Microsoft first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: AWS adds Graviton Savings Dashboard to help enterprises optimize infra costs
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has launched a dashboard for its Arm-based Graviton CPU that will measure savings opportunities in an effort to help enterprises further optimize their expenditure on subscribed infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Don't get fooled by fake phone updates and notifications
item.description: Updates to apps are essential for maintaining the performance and security of your devices, including bug fixes, new features and security patches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
